title: AL's Allay Pack
description: A pack that adds more Allay variants!
body:
A pack that gives Allays and Vexes more variants either based on the extended Minecraft universe but in the style of vanilla Minecraft (Java Edition) or just some cool Nametag-only easter-eggs!

Allays can spawn as either Blue or Yellow, like in Minecraft Legends, and Vexes have more variety with their wings and brows.

 

Skins/Variants

 

*2 Naturally spawning Allay Variants (Blue and Yellow) + 15 Nametag variants

*3 Vex Variants

 

 

Secret Renamable  Allay Skins/Variants

*Guardian Vex

*Baby Ghast

*Blue Wisp

*Golden Wisp

*Pink Wisp

*Navi

*V1

*V2

*Miku

*Teto

*Neru

*Doki

*Mint

*Adam

*Lute

 

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
